# CircuitOS

> Stochastic models propose. Deterministic factories commit. Ledgers prove. — Governed AI for revenue teams.

CircuitOS is a governed revenue platform: agents propose at the gates, deterministic factories commit with verify, and an append-only, hash-chained decision ledger records the moves (live in tenant deployments; platform-wide attestation ledger in rollout). Built for $10M–$50M businesses that need AI that moves fast and survives a security review.

## Core Capabilities

- Predictive lead scoring with a registered signal registry and Bayesian inference
- Autonomous outreach with human approval gates on all actions
- Content intelligence with multi-model quality evaluation and fact-checking
- AgentOps governance dashboard — real-time observability into every AI decision
- Closed-loop feedback from GA4 engagement data
- Multi-vertical support with isolated infrastructure per business line
- Append-only decision trail on scored and governed actions (hash-chained, verifiable)
- Confidence-based autonomy governance (execute / escalate / block)

## How It Works

1. Configure: ICP encoded, scoring model calibrated, brand voice set
2. Score: Every lead evaluated across registered signals for fit, intent, and timing
3. Decide: Bayesian confidence thresholds determine autonomous execution vs. human escalation
4. Engage: Personalized outreach in your brand voice with governance gates
5. Prove: Full decision trail — every score, every gate evaluation, every routing decision auditable

## Integrations

Connects to any CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, and more), email automation platforms, Google Analytics 4, and 5+ AI models for multi-model quality evaluation. Full REST API and webhook support for custom integrations.

## Pricing

Monthly plans:
- Growth: $3,500/mo — single vertical, scoring, outreach, CRM, content intelligence, audit trail
- Scale: $6,500/mo — multi-vertical, enrichment, GA4 feedback, AgentOps dashboard, social distribution
- Enterprise: $12,000/mo — unlimited verticals, custom integrations, token cost tracking, SLA, dedicated success manager

Implementation (one-time build fee) — transparent, line-item pricing:
- Core: Platform Provisioning ($2,500) + ICP Encoding ($2,000) = $4,500 base
- Modules: Lead Scoring ($2,500), Outreach Automation ($2,000), Content Intelligence ($2,000), Social Distribution ($1,000), CRM Integration ($1,500), Attribution & Feedback Loop ($1,000)
- Add-ons: Additional verticals ($3,500 each), data migration ($500/source), custom API integrations ($1,000 each), extended training ($750)
- Interactive build calculator: https://usecircuitos.com/#build-calculator

- Status: Running in production on operator-owned businesses; governed decisioning substrate with extensive automated test coverage

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is CircuitOS?
A: A revenue intelligence platform that scores your leads, decides what to do, and proves why — with full audit trail. It combines predictive scoring, AI outreach, content intelligence, and governance in one closed-loop system.

Q: How does the scoring work?
A: Your ICP and qualification criteria are encoded before launch. The Bayesian scoring model evaluates registered signals across fit, intent, and timing. Pre-calibrated from day one, then improves with real outcome data.

Q: How is CircuitOS different from Salesforce or HubSpot?
A: CircuitOS is not a CRM — it connects to your existing CRM. It's the intelligence layer that sits on top: scoring leads before they enter your pipeline, governing AI decisions with confidence thresholds, and providing a full audit trail of why every decision was made.

Q: Can it handle multiple businesses?
A: Yes. Unlimited verticals with isolated infrastructure per business line. Each gets its own scoring model, templates, CRM routing, and database.

Q: What is AgentOps?
A: AgentOps is the operational discipline for governing autonomous AI agents. CircuitOS includes a real-time AgentOps dashboard showing every decision (execute/escalate/block), confidence scores, and audit trails — the same governance enterprise buyers require.

Q: Is content published automatically?
A: No. All content and outreach requires explicit human approval. Every action has a full audit trail with confidence scoring and escalation reasoning.

Q: What CRMs are supported?
A: CircuitOS connects to any CRM — HubSpot, Salesforce, and more via native adapters or REST API/webhooks.

Q: How does the feedback loop work?
A: Real engagement data from GA4 (time-on-page, conversions, bounce rate, scroll depth) feeds back into the scoring model automatically. Each cycle makes predictions more accurate.

Q: Who is CircuitOS built for?
A: $10M–$50M businesses that want enterprise-grade revenue intelligence without enterprise complexity. Professional services, franchise operations, e-commerce/DTC, and SaaS revenue teams.

---
Last Updated: March 2026

## Causal Attribution (the Honesty Gap)

Your AI lied. We have receipts. Every dashboard shows you credit. Credit is not causation. CircuitOS measures what your marketing actually caused, and refuses to show a number it can't prove.

- Correlational multi-touch attribution (first-touch, last-touch, linear, time-decay, position, Shapley) is rendered as heuristic credit, never as causal lift
- Causal lift is measured with backdoor confounder adjustment and FWL residualization against a measured per-segment baseline, always with a confidence interval
- Every causal result is born uncitable; it becomes citable only after a calibration-harness pass plus a named human confirmation, and exporting an unproven number raises an exception
- When measurement is pending, the product says "pending" in words. No placeholder digits. The refusal is the feature.

## Key Pages

- [The Honesty Gap manifesto](https://usecircuitos.com/insights/honesty-gap): why attribution dashboards flatter you and how the refusal works
- [Deterministic factory](https://usecircuitos.com/insights/deterministic-factory): stochastic models propose, factories commit, ledgers prove
- [Governance manifesto](https://usecircuitos.com/insights/governance-manifesto): why ungoverned AI decisions are a liability
- [Lead walk-through](https://usecircuitos.com/insights/lead-walk-through): a governed decision in real time
- [Live demo](https://usecircuitos.com/demo): labeled synthetic data, because the claim gate applies to demos too
